recommendations.title: In Her Skin
recommendations.overview: Tale of a 15-year-old Australian girl who went missing.

recommendations.title: Cross the Line
recommendations.overview: A good-natured man has an unexpected deadly confrontation. Instincts kick in to clean up the mess caused in the name of self-defense but does one really get away free after killing someone?

recommendations.title: The Good Thief
recommendations.overview: An aging gambler on a losing streak attempts to rob a casino in Monte Carlo. But someone's already tipped off the cops before he even makes a move.

recommendations.title: Extortion
recommendations.overview: A doctor desperately tries to save his wife and their 5 year old son after their vacation in the Bahamas takes an unexpected turn.

recommendations.title: Rashomon
recommendations.overview: Four people recount different versions of the story of a man's murder and the rape of his wife.

recommendations.title: The Woman in Cabin 10
recommendations.overview: On a lavish yacht for an assignment, a journalist sees a passenger go overboard. But when no one believes her, she risks her life to uncover the truth.

recommendations.title: Dr. Phibes Rises Again
recommendations.overview: The eminent Dr. Phibes awakens from a decade of suspended animation and heads to Egypt with the corpse of his dead wife, which he intends to resurrect by murdering people in strange and heinous ways.

recommendations.title: The Omega Man
recommendations.overview: Due to an experimental vaccine, Dr. Robert Neville is the only human survivor of an apocalyptic war waged with biological weapons. Besides him, only a few hundred deformed, nocturnal people remain; sensitive to light, and homicidally psychotic.

recommendations.title: Last Straw
recommendations.overview: A rural roadside diner becomes the host of a maniacal killing spree – leaving a young waitress to clean up the mess. After hard-headed Nancy fires the staff at her dad’s diner, she decides to cover the last shift of the night by herself. Little does

recommendations.title: Rowdy Rathore
recommendations.overview: A small-time thug comes across a young girl who claims him to be her father, following which he realizes he has a lookalike who's being hunted by goons.
